message:
feat(random): add BitGenerator facade, state serialization, and SeedSequence snapshot/restore

Implement the full NumPy-compatible BitGenerator layer on top of the
existing DeterministicRng and SeedSequence primitives. This enables
reproducible random streams across four algorithm families (MT19937,
PCG64, Philox, SFC64) with deterministic jump-ahead, state
capture/restore, and pickle-compatible serialization.

New types and APIs:
- BitGeneratorKind enum with per-algorithm stream tags and jump strides
- BitGeneratorError with typed reason codes matching packet-007 policy
- BitGeneratorState with self-validating schema (version, algorithm tag,
  stream seed, counter) that rejects mismatched or malformed entries
- BitGenerator: wraps DeterministicRng with algorithm-specific seed
  mixing, jump_in_place/jumped for parallel stream forking, and
  state get/set with schema validation
- GeneratorFacade: binds a BitGenerator to an optional SeedSequence
  with deterministic identity verification (bind_seed_sequence fails
  closed when generator and sequence identities diverge)
- GeneratorPicklePayload + from_pickle_payload for full roundtrip
  serialization including seed sequence snapshots
- SeedSequenceSnapshot struct and snapshot()/from_snapshot() methods
  that preserve spawn_counter across serialization boundaries
- with_spawn_key_and_counter() internal constructor factored out of
  SeedSequence::spawn() to share with snapshot restore path

Constants added:
- MAX_RNG_JUMP_OPERATIONS (1024), MAX_RNG_STATE_SCHEMA_FIELDS (4096),
  BIT_GENERATOR_STATE_SCHEMA_VERSION (1)

Tests:
- Determinism per algorithm, cross-algorithm stream non-aliasing
- Jump contract enforcement (zero and overflow rejection)
- State roundtrip through set_state with schema validation
- GeneratorFacade binding fail-closed and pickle roundtrip
- SeedSequence snapshot spawn_counter preservation
- Error reason code coverage for all BitGeneratorError variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
